---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: "fix: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear, concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected behaviour

What did you expect to happen?

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened? Include any error messages, status codes, or console output.

## Screenshots or recordings

If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording to help explain the problem.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 126 |
| OS | e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11 |
| App URL | e.g. https://task-manager-zeta-sepia.vercel.app or localhost |
| Node.js version (if running locally) | e.g. 20.11.0 |

## Additional context

Any other information that might be relevant — e.g. does it happen every time or intermittently? Does it affect all users or only specific accounts?
